strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff Software Engineer, not Principal/Director-level IC
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product or platform leadership at scale
No advanced degree in AI and no recognized AI expertise or public AI products

key_factors.factor: Years of engineering breadth across stacks

response.justification: The candidate brings broad full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience spanning 15+ years, with entrepreneurial credentials via GISCollective and emerging exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks. However, the role calls for a Director-level Principal Engineer with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms, which is not strongly evidenced in the resume. Fit is partial: strong generalist engineering foundation, weaker on the strategic AI leadership signal the role emphasizes.
